title: Register 19 planning docs as citation sources
definition_of_done: 20 sources registered in manifest (19 new + 1 pre-existing E5 plan); trls sources manifest shows 20 entries; sources manifest committed
outcome: 20 sources registered in manifest: 19 planning docs (docs/ root + docs/superpowers/plans/) + 1 pre-existing E5 plan; trls sources manifest shows 20 entries

notes.msg: Registered 19 new planning docs as citation sources in .issues/sources/manifest.json. Total is now 20 entries (19 new + 1 pre-existing E5 plan). Sources span docs/ root (trellis-prd.md, architecture.md, ai-context-management-market-analysis.md, dogfood-ceremony-e1.md, dogfooding-learnings.md, gap-resolutions.md, plan-post-bootstrap.json) and docs/superpowers/plans/ (e1-bootstrap, e3-collaboration, ci-validation-pipeline, test-coverage-hardening, trls-worker-build-integration, e4-index, e4-s1 through e4-s5, citation-remediation).
